creator: lichray@gmail.com
text:
The famous RTS framework spring was updated to 0.82.7.1 . Note that I removed the patch which claim itself as "to remove unit pieces that don't render correctly". I don't agree with the patch.

	And I replaced the static pkg-plist with PORTDATA. Actually, the old plist is incorrect. Use PORTDATA can make it correct even in the future :)
